title: NON-CLASSICAL QUANTUM CORRELATIONS IN QUANTUM GAMES
author_string: DU, JIANGFENG, CHENG, GUANGLEI, LI, HUI
journal: International Journal of Modern Physics B
publisher: World Scientific Pub Co Pte Lt
abstract: In this paper we propose an interesting scheme for quantum games. It is found that, for the particular case of the famous Prisoners' Dilemma game, the superiority of the quantum game over its classical counterpart is interconnected to the non-classical quantum correlation between the two players.
